chapter_title.en: Chapter 51 – The truthfulness and the repayment of the entrustments

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/183)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/183)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَا فُضَيْلُ إِنَّ الصَّادِقَ أَوَّلُ مَنْ يُصَدِّقُهُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ يَعْلَمُ أَنَّهُ صَادِقٌ وَ تُصَدِّقُهُ نَفْسُهُ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّهُ صَادِقٌ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Abu Ismail Al Basry, from Fuzayl Bin Yasaar who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> said: ‘O Fuzayl! The truthful is the first one whom Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Ratifies. He knows that he is truthful, and its ratification is that he comes to know that he is truthful’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from abu Isma’il al-Basri from Fudayl ibn Yasar who has said the following: “Once abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) said to me, ‘O Fudayl, the truthfulness of a truthful person is first verified by Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy. He knows that he is truthful. Then his own soul confirms; it knows his truthfulness.’”
